sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports anxiety and stress. He reports excessive sugar intake. The patient denies nausea, dizziness, fever, and chills. The patient reports pain.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient has trace pitting edema to the lower extremities. Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has newly diagnosed diabetes. The patient reports anxiety. The patient has a history of epilepsy.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: A hemoglobin a1c test will be ordered. The patient will continue taking keppra. The patient will continue taking metformin 500 mg twice a day.
